description: DNS record resource, used to create, query, update, delete, and list a single DNS record under a specified domain name.

CreatedAt.description: Creation time of the DNS record.

Enable.description: Whether the DNS record is enabled; if disabled, the record is inactive.

FQDN.description: Host name included in the DNS record, using FQDN (Fully Qualified Domain Name) format; this field is deprecated.

Host.description: Host record, the prefix of the subdomain; `@` represents the root domain itself.

Line.description: Line code corresponding to the DNS record, such as `default`.

Operators.description: List of account IDs that recently operated on this DNS record.

PQDN.description: Host name included in the DNS record, using PQDN (Partially Qualified Domain Name) format.

RecordID.description: Unique ID of the DNS record.

RecordSetID.description: ID of the record set containing the DNS record; returned only for A, AAAA, and CNAME types.

Remark.description: Remarks for the DNS record, supports UTF-8 encoding and up to 16 characters.

TTL.description: Expiration time of the DNS record, in seconds.

Tags.description: Tag information for the DNS record; if it contains `GTMLock`, the record is associated with a GTM instance.

UpdatedAt.description: Last updated time of the DNS record.

Value.description: Record value of the DNS record.

Weight.description: Weight of the DNS record, effective only when load balancing is enabled for the record set.

ZID.description: Domain name ID, can be obtained via interfaces such as `ListZones`.
